## Rainmeter log

Turn on `EnableLogging=1`, refresh the skin, wait one poll cycle, then paste the `BTBattery:` lines from Rainmeter's log.

```text

```

## HID report information

If this is a controller, headset, mouse, keyboard, or other HID device and you can capture HID report bytes, paste them here. If not, leave this blank.
